summary:
Given an m x n matrix, return all of its elements collected in spiral order.

Start at the top-left corner and walk right across the top row, then down the right side, then left across the bottom, then up the left side, spiraling inward until every cell has been visited.

examples.explanation: Trace the outer ring clockwise (1,2,3,6,9,8,7,4), then the single remaining center cell (5).
